title: Emergency Communications - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Emergency Communications 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND BUREAU OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT BASIC EARTHQUAKE EMERGENCY COMMUNICATION NODE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a place to go after a major earthquake to ask for emergency assistance if phone service is down, or to report severe damage or injury. At these sites, there will be city employees, Neighborhood Emergency Team (NET) members, or other volunteers operating emergency radio equipment. The agency website offers a map of multiple locations. 9911 SE Bush Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours; operational within 24-48 hours after an earthquake Email (503) 823-4375 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND BASIC EARTHQUAKE EMERGENCY COMMUNICATION NODE
